name: iLabs ST87M01
description: Arduino library for the ST Microelectronics ST87M01 cellular NB-IoT / LTE-M modem. Wraps the AT command interface and exposes Arduino-style Client and UDP objects for TCP/UDP over the cellular PDP context, plus helpers for NB-IoT power saving, cell and signal info, and network bring-up.
keywords: cellular, nb-iot, lte-m, modem, st87m01, at-commands, iot
